privileged_info_summary: Task is for configuring an auto-reply in FreeScout help desk software. The mailbox is named 'IT Support' with email 'it-support@helpdesk.local'. The auto-reply subject must be 'We've received your request - IT Support'. The message body must contain three specific phrases: 'within 24 hours', 'December 14-15', and '(555) 987-6543'. All data is synthetic, running in a local Docker environment at localhost:8080.
